headlines.headline: Jovor Networks secures $50M contract with a national infrastructure agency

headlines.headline: Jovor Networks CFO addresses investor concerns in open letter

sentiment.reasoning: A CFO addressing investor concerns in an open letter is an attempt to reassure the market, but the actual impact depends on the content of the letter and the severity of the concerns.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
